title: Saudi Arabian Glassy Jelly Tofu Quesadilla
description: A fusion dish of traditional Saudi flavors with Mexican quesadilla, featuring a glassy jelly made with pomegranate molasses and a crispy lamination puff pastry.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) with a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roll out the lamination puff pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Cut the pastry into 2 equal rectangles, about 1/4 inch (6 mm) from the edges.
Spread the crumbled tofu evenly over one half of each rectangle, leaving a 1/2 inch (1 cm) border.
Brush the edges of the pastry with ghee or oil.
Fold the other half of the pastry over the tofu, pressing gently to seal.
Brush the top of each quesadilla with pomegranate molasses and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake the quesadillas for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
While the quesadillas are baking, mix the pomegranate molasses, rose water, cardamom powder, and cinnamon powder in a small bowl.
Remove the quesadillas from the oven and let them cool for 5 minutes.
Drizzle the glassy jelly mixture over the warm quesadillas and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
